title: Provider execution manifest
description: Per-operator execution manifest. Declares the active wire channel id and SDK billing/execution methods the adapter implements. Wire product codes remain in graph.json edges.wire; credentials are runtime config only.

wire.description: Wire channel id; must match a key under graph.json edges.wire for this operator

items.description: Billing subservice method exposed when this wire is active
Postage execution subservice method exposed when this wire is active
